data.title: Component-Based Interface
data.description: The website uses a component-based architecture for reusability and scalability.

data.title: Responsive Design
data.description: Design adapts across various devices and screen sizes for optimal user experience.

data.title: Server-Side Rendering
data.description: Server-side rendering is utilized to improve load times and SEO.

data.title: Multi-Layered Architecture
data.description: The architecture includes multiple layers: presentation, business logic, and data access.

data.title: Content Delivery Network
data.description: A CDN is used to distribute content closer to users for enhanced load times.
